title: Savory Chewy Turkish Lamb Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep friendly dish featuring tender lamb cubes marinated in sour cream and slow-cooked to perfection, ideal for a satisfying lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Saffron Threads
ingredients.notes: Or other dried spices like cumin or paprika can be used as a substitute

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream with chopped onion and minced garlic. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Season the lamb cubes generously with salt, pepper, paprika, and a pinch of saffron. Marinate the lamb in the sour cream mixture for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the lamb from the marinade, reserving some of the marinade for later use. Pat dry with paper towels to remove excess liquid.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the marinated lamb cubes and cook until they start getting golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to low-medium and add reserved marinade to the skillet. Stir gently to combine with the lamb. Cover and simmer for another 10-12 minutes or until the lamb is fully cooked and tender.
Serve hot as a main dish or use it in wraps, salads, or sandwiches.
